description:
Model a cylindrical water tank and install a solar panel array on its flat circular roof using the Skelion plugin. Ensure NO panels overhang the edge of the tank. 

1. Use the Circle tool (type '48s' and hit Enter to set sides to 48 for smoothness) to draw a circle with an 8-meter radius on the ground plane.
2. Use Push/Pull to extrude it upward by 6 meters, creating a cylinder.
3. Select the top circular face.
4. Use Skelion to insert solar panels (Landscape, Flush mount, default dimensions).
5. CRITICAL STEP: Orbit the view and manually delete any solar panel components that overhang the circular edge. All panels must be completely contained within the roof surface footprint.
6. Save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\circular_tank_solar.skp'.
